omittedReadyDemos.reason: Requires a separate LangGraph Agent Server service and fresh-consumer packaging before it can be exported as a self-contained shadcn registry demo.
Uses an OpenAI Agents SDK backend bridge that still needs a portable registry copy and fresh-consumer acceptance.
Application-shape port is larger than the ordinary demo chunk and needs a narrower registry packaging contract first.

demos.title: Foundation Chat
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. This is the smallest production-ready chat slice and the recommended first install.

demos.title: RAG Chatbot
demos.setup: Needs DATABASE_URL, an embedding model, and a Postgres database with vector search for document indexing.

demos.title: Multimodal Chatbot
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Use a model that can process the image or PDF parts you send.

demos.title: Object Generation
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Keep the route model aligned with the structured output schema.

demos.title: Memory & Persistence Agent
demos.setup: Needs DATABASE_URL for persistent threads, saved memories, and compaction checkpoints.

demos.title: Streaming Chat Shell
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Useful as the smallest replayable streaming shell after Foundation Chat.

demos.title: Loop Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Use a model with reliable tool-calling behavior for the approval loop.

demos.title: Trace Eval Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. It adds trace, deterministic checks, and judge output around one research run.

demos.title: Persistent Agent
demos.setup: Needs DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL for addressable chats and resumable streams.

demos.title: Sandbox Agent
demos.setup: Needs Vercel Sandbox credentials plus AI Gateway credentials for persistent preview sessions.

demos.title: Skills Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Runs skill loading and file tools in a local sandbox by default; Vercel Sandbox credentials are optional for remote execution.

demos.title: MCP Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only for the base chat. Local Next.js runtime inspection depends on the installed MCP tooling.
